rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that *(a + 5) reads one element past the end of the array a, which is an out-of-bounds stack read.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes changing *(a + 5) to *(a + 4) or using a[4], which are valid local fixes to read the last valid element.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests using std::array<int, 5> with .at(index) for bounds-checked access, which satisfies the global_fix criterion.
